2448.reason: [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+2 exceeds tokenList size, and the logic is flawed because it assumes 'main(' appears at specific positions rather than checking for the actual 'main' function definition pattern]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+2 exceeds tokenList size, and the logic is flawed because it assumes 'main(' appears at specific positions rather than checking for the actual 'main' function definition pattern]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect and can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException. It should check current token, not future tokens, and the logic for distinguishing Decl/FuncDef from MainFuncDef is flawed.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition is incorrect: it assumes the main function always starts with "main(" at specific offsets, but doesn't account for empty Decl/FuncDef sections or proper lookahead. It may cause ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+2 exceeds tokenList size, and fails to correctly identify where Decl/FuncDef end and MainFuncDef begins.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+2 exceeds tokenList size, and the logic for detecting MainFuncDef is incorrect because it doesn't check if "main" is followed by '(' on the same function declaration]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+2 exceeds tokenList size, and the logic is incorrect for determining MainFuncDef start]

2452.reason: [This condition can also cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+1 exceeds tokenList size, and incorrectly assumes all remaining declarations before 'main' are FuncDef when there might be no FuncDef at all]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can also cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+1 exceeds tokenList size, and incorrectly assumes all remaining declarations before 'main' are FuncDef when there might be no FuncDef at all]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-2: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue - checking idx+1 can go out of bounds and doesn't properly identify when MainFuncDef starts. Should check current token instead.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-3: 0.5 , reason:  [Same issue: relies on fixed offset lookahead without bounds checking, and doesn't properly detect the start of MainFuncDef which must be exactly "int main()". This can cause infinite loops or incorrect parsing.]
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-4: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+1 exceeds tokenList size, and it doesn't properly verify that MAINTK is part of a complete MainFuncDef pattern 'int main()']
reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-5: 0.5 , reason:  [This condition can cause IndexOutOfBoundsException when idx+1 exceeds tokenList size, and doesn't properly handle the case where MainFuncDef starts immediately]
